_instructions.description: Manual override configuration for trainer scheduling. Edit this file before running the pipeline.
_instructions.inactive_trainers: List trainer names here to exclude them entirely from scheduling.
_instructions.tier_overrides: Override a trainer's tier (1=highest, 3=lowest). Affects prime-slot priority and 15h/week targets.
_instructions.leave_periods: Block a trainer from all slots during a date range. 'location' is optional — omit to block at all locations.
_instructions.off_days: Block a trainer on specific dates. 'location' is optional.
_instructions.available_days_overrides: Override which weekdays a trainer works at a location. Replaces the profile default.
_instructions.max_classes_overrides: Override max classes per day or per week for a trainer at a location.
_instructions.location_preferences: Use 'excluded' to stop scheduling a trainer at a location. 'preferred' boosts their score ranking.
_instructions.time_window_overrides: Override earliest/latest time a trainer can teach at a location.
